arts.ttl: Haaland reaches significant milestone in Juventus win
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland reaches a significant goalscoring milestone in Thursday's dominant 5-2 win over Juventus at the Club World Cup.

arts.ttl: Club World Cup Daily: Ait-Nouri stars for Man City in dominant win over Juventus
arts.sum: Manchester City staked their claim as tournament favorites with a commanding 5-2 win over Juventus. Here's what you need to know from Wednesday's Club World Cup action.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland hits incredible goal landmark at JUST 24 - as he comes off the bench to help Man City ease past Juventus in Club World Cup
arts.sum: City have been the biggest beneficiaries of Haaland's rise to 300, the Norwegian scoring over 100 times for the Premier League club since joining in a €60 million (£51.2 million) deal from Dortmund in 2022.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola hails Man City after impressive win over Juventus
arts.sum: Erling Haaland scored his 300th career goal.

arts.ttl: Tudor: ‘Manchester City on a different level to Juventus right now’
arts.sum: Igor Tudor admits Manchester City ‘are too much’ for Juventus right now after a 5-2...

arts.ttl: Rodri: Pep Guardiola hails returning midfielder as Manchester City batter Juventus to top group
arts.sum: The Spaniard made his first appearance in 10 months as City put five past the Bianconeri

arts.ttl: Five-star Man City thrash Juve to achieve impressive winning feat
arts.sum: Manchester City produce a five-star performance to ease to a commanding victory in their Club World Cup clash against Juventus, sealing top spot in Group G.

arts.ttl: Man City trounce Juventus to win Group G at CWC
arts.sum: Manchester City secured top spot in Group G of the Club World Cup with a 5-2 thrashing of Juventus on Thursday, exposing the Serie A side's defensive frailties in emphatic fashion.

arts.ttl: Man City thrash Juventus in statement win at Club World Cup
arts.sum: Manchester City thrashed Juventus 5-2 to finish top of group G at the Club World Cup, meaning they head into the knockouts as the only perfect team.

arts.ttl: Juventus 2-5 Manchester City: Rodri stars on return to starting XI as Bianconeri humbled in Orlando
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola handed Igor Tudor the biggest loss of his Juventus career to date
